jszip@3.10.1.reason: AniCards uses JSZip under its permissive MIT option for client-side ZIP export.

@img/sharp-libvips-linux-x64@1.2.4.reason: Sharp's Linux x64 libvips binary is required for image processing and is explicitly reviewed as an LGPL exception.
